name: rty-web-accessibility
description: Ensures all generated HTML and CSS/SCSS is WCAG 2.1/2.2 Level AA compliant

interface.shortDescription: Ensure generated HTML/CSS is WCAG 2.1/2.2 Level AA compliant.
interface.longDescription: Ensures all generated HTML and CSS/SCSS meets WCAG 2.1/2.2 Level AA standards. Covers semantic structure, ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, color contrast, and Riverty Design System component usage. Includes a contrast-ratio verification script.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me make this HTML component WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliant.
